data.title: transcosmos obtains ISO 9001 certification in Malaysia for quality management, improving back-office operations globally.
data.description: transcosmos has recently obtained ISO 9001 certification in Malaysia on February 20, 2026. The company is known for consolidating clients' back-office operations globally to provide top-notch services. This certification is a part of transcosmos's efforts to improve its quality management system and ensure high-quality service delivery.

data.title: ATOM price may hit $2.40 resistance by Mar 2026. Currently trading at $2.28 with RSI at 56.73. Bearish MACD signals caution for March targets.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Cosmos (ATOM) is currently trading at $2.28, indicating a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 56.73. Analysis indicates a possible increase to hit a resistance level at $2.40. However, the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) portrays a bearish trend, recommending caution regarding future targets in March.

data.title: The CEO Magazine has launched The Collection, highlighting trusted businesses for global executives and high-net-worth audiences.
data.description: In a statement released on February 20, 2026, The CEO Magazine unveiled the introduction of The Collection, a fresh editorial platform aimed at highlighting outstanding businesses, services, and experiences favored by international executives and high-net-worth individuals. This initiative is crafted for sustained exposure to a selected audience of influential individuals, with a primary focus on showcasing remarkable entities and offerings.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) at $556.70 eyes $580 recovery with neutral RSI at 51.18. Technical analysis hints at nearing $580 resistance in a week, despite bearish MACD signals.
data.description: The current trading price of BCH is $556.70, with a neutral RSI of 51.18 indicating no clear trend. Technical analysis indicates a possible movement towards the $580 resistance level in the next week. However, bearish MACD signals advise caution regarding this potential price increase.

data.title: Chainlink aims for $14.63 recovery from $8.59, facing resistance at $8.98 with mixed signals and bearish momentum.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Chainlink is currently priced at $8.59, and technical indicators are indicating conflicting signals. Renowned analyst Ali Charts has set a target price of $14.63 for LINK. However, the digital asset is encountering strong resistance at $8.98 due to the bearish MACD momentum.

data.title: UNI price forecast: $3.38 at oversold RSI 36.23, aims $4.03-$4.13 recovery in March, analysts predict breakout.
data.description: The cryptocurrency UNI is currently trading at $3.38 per unit, with its Relative Strength Index (RSI) standing at 36.23, indicating it is oversold. Technical analysts are predicting a potential recovery up to the range of $4.03 to $4.13, following a breakout in March from the current support levels.

data.title: AVAX may hit $12-15 by March 2026 as it holds at $8.92, with RSI. Expect a 30-60% rise after a resistance breakout.
data.description: The price of Avalanche's cryptocurrency, AVAX, appears to have reached a potential low point at $8.92, as indicated by a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI). Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of a significant increase of 30-60% in value, potentially reaching the range of $12 to $15 in the next 4-6 weeks if key resistance levels are surpassed.

data.title: Select Water Solutions, Inc. priced a public offering of 13,725,491 shares of Class A common stock.
data.description: In Gainesville, Texas, on February 19, 2026, Select Water Solutions, Inc. disclosed the pricing details for their underwritten public offering. The offering includes 13,725,491 shares of Class A common stock with a par value of $0.01 per share. This announcement was made by Select, which is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol WTTR.

data.description: During the ETH Denver conference, Caitlin Long mentioned that the Senate support has been affected by the ethics controversy surrounding crypto projects linked to Trump. This has created complications in garnering support, with Long highlighting the challenges faced in this regard.

data.title: Bitdeer's value drops by 17% following a $300M debt offering; shares down 29% in 2021 after convertible senior note launch.
data.description: Bitdeer has recently initiated its second convertible senior note offering. This move comes as its shares have experienced a 29% decline since the beginning of the year.

data.title: Polkadot aims at $1.35 recovery from oversold techs at $1.28, with key support at $1.23.
data.description: The price of DOT is currently sitting at $1.28 per token, with technical analysis indicating that it is oversold. Analysts are predicting a potential recovery that could push the price towards the $1.35 resistance level. However, it is crucial for DOT to maintain the support level of $1.23 to avoid a further decline.

data.description: According to recent analyses, MATIC is anticipated to see a potential rebound to the $0.45-$0.52 range over the next 4-6 weeks if buyers successfully surpass the resistance at $0.58. However, the ongoing downward trend continues below crucial thresholds.

data.title: Investors move capital towards tokenized assets as DeFi sees a decline. Experts view the trend as market maturation, not panic.
data.description: Investors are moving money out of decentralized finance (DeFi) and into tokenized assets amid a market shift. This rotation reflects a growing maturity in the markets rather than a complete abandonment. The movement of capital highlights the transition occurring, with significant amounts of funds being reallocated. This change in strategy is seen by experts as a natural evolution in the market, signaling a shift in investment preferences.
